name: Iron Deficiency Anemia - Low Hemoglobin Lab Query
description: Tests ability to find anemic patients via low hemoglobin (<12 g/dL). First Hgb lab test. Includes Path D (low Hgb without formal IDA dx).
prompt: Find patients with hemoglobin results below 12 g/dL.

prompts.broad: Find patients with hemoglobin measurements below 12 g/dL — reflective of anemia (normal F: 12-16, M: 14-18 g/dL).
prompts.expert: Search Observation resources with LOINC 718-7 (Hemoglobin in Blood) where value-quantity < 12 g/dL. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|718-7&value-quantity=lt12||g/dL

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with low Hgb (<12 g/dL). Includes Path D (no formal anemia dx).
